member.name: M:GTA.UI.Notification.Show(GTA.UI.NotificationIcon,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary:
Creates a more advanced (SMS-alike)
above the minimap showing a sender icon, subject and the message.
member.param:
If
the message will fade in.

if set to
the notification will blink.
member.returns:
The handle of the
which can be used to hide it using
.
